(SEE STONEGATE HOMEOWNERS ASSN. V. STABEN (2006) 144 CAL.APP.4TH 740, 748.) A COMPLAINT "MAY PLEAD IN THE ALTERNATIVE"; FACTUALLY AND/OR LEGALLY INCONSISTENT ALLEGATIONS ARE PERMISSIBLE. (ADAMS V. PAUL (1995) 11 CAL.4TH 583, 593.) ORDER IS SIGNED. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER, CLERK: W. Off Calendar Apr-14-2022 Continued To Jun-15-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-17-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom Conference
Vivy Dang, Esq., THE WARD FIRM, (858) 454-5777, for Plaintiff, NISSIM PAINTING INC.
Charlie W. Yu, Esq., ESSENTIAL LAW GROUP, PC, (415) 349-5180, for Defendant JMA CONSTRUCTION, INC..

Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:(as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

CROSS DEFENDANT NISSIM PAINTING INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DEMURRER to CROSS COMPLAINT

Nissim Painting Inc.'s demurrer to JMA Construction, Inc.'s cross-complaint is overruled. The second count adequately pleads a cause of action for negligence. (See Stonegate Homeowners Assn. v. Staben (2006) 144 Cal.App.4th 740, 748.) A complaint "may plead in the alternative"; factually and/or legally inconsistent allegations are permissible. (Adams v. Paul (1995) 11 Cal.4th 583, 593.)

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR# 8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com mailto:maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. (302/RBU)
